title: Kerry Gammill
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Kerry Gammill''' (born [[April 26]], [[1950s#1954|1954]]) is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] artist who worked on many of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] comics. Along with [[Mary Jo Duffy]] and [[Tom Palmer]], he created characters such as smuggler [[Rik Duel/Legends|Rik Duel]] and species such as the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltrons]].
